title: 高松宮記念の後に・それが私の選択

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I win the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, which means I
beat King... Even so, she holds her head high,
proud to have run valiantly until the very end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, she sees through my hesitation and
tells me to take pride in being myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must stop being afraid of hurting others and
behave in a way that's true to myself! I decide to
participate in the talk show at the Fan Fest as a
way to show my conviction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's scary, of course, but I have someone by my
side who reassures me that I'm not alone!
